divider: Teacher opens lesson with this frame. No student action — teacher sets context, goal, relevance. Concrete language only. Why today matters.
guide: "You just saw four rectangles and noticed differences between them — things like how many rows they had or how long each row was. Now you're going to build your own rectangles on the grid, one row at a time. When you tap Check, you'll see how many squares you used — and we'll write a sentence that names what that area means. Everything we do today builds to one sentence: ___ is a multiple of ___ because ___ × ___ = ___. Let's build the first rectangle now."
